title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 87.320 - General reserve fund
text:
87.320.  General reserve fund. — The general reserve fund shall be the fund in which shall be accumulated all reserves for benefits not provided by members' contributions, and which are provided by contributions made by the city.
(L. 1943 p. 708 § 8, A.L. 1959 S.B. 314 § 86.583)
